inputs.prompt: Director plan and Architect spec distilled into executable work items
inputs.context: Pipeline context including project constraints, current phase, and prior artifacts

outputs.primary: Ordered task queue with assignments, dependencies, priorities, and verification gates
outputs.format: Structured task list grouped by agent and phase with dependency edges

failure_handling.on_blocker: Escalate to Director with options; re-sequence tasks to unblock parallel work
failure_handling.on_conflict: Resolve by dependency correctness and phase gates; request Architect clarification if needed
